heading: Disposition of fees
label: 7283 Disposition of fees
text: Except for amounts received pursuant to , all fees received by the Court of Appeals for Veterans Claims shall be covered into the Treasury as miscellaneous receipts.section 7285 of this title
notes: Amendments1998— substituted “Court of Appeals for Veterans Claims” for “Court of Veterans Appeals”.Pub. L. 105–3681991— renumbered as this section and substituted “7285” for “4085”.Pub. L. 102–40section 4083 of this title

Effective Date of 1998 AmendmentAmendment by effective on first day of first month beginning more than 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 105–368section 513 of Pub. L. 105–368section 7251 of this titleNov. 11, 1998
